title: Harden base OS and verify patch baseline
description: Keep Debian base fully patched before every major bootstrap run.
acceptance_criteria: `apt list --upgradable` returns only 'Listing...' and no package rows.

title: Establish Nix as default toolchain entrypoint
description: Use Nix shell for all reproducible local workflows.
acceptance_criteria: `fleetctl shell` opens successfully and includes git/curl/jq/openssh.

title: Enable GitHub SSH authentication for write operations
description: Register local ed25519 key in GitHub and validate auth.
acceptance_criteria: `ssh -T git@github.com` returns authenticated message (non-shell access is expected).

title: Version and protect fleet toolkit with CI
description: Track fleet scripts in git and enforce shell checks in CI.
acceptance_criteria: GitHub Actions `Shell CI` passes on push/PR.

title: Create standardized repo sync cadence
description: Run fleet bootstrap as daily/weekly sync point for all managed repos.
acceptance_criteria: `fleetctl bootstrap` updates all repos cleanly with no merge conflicts.

title: Define execution board in Linear
description: Create one active project with this backlog and clear ownership/status.
acceptance_criteria: At least 10 non-canceled issues exist and one issue is In Progress.

title: Wire GitHub + Linear issue linking workflow
description: Adopt branch/PR naming tied to Linear issue IDs.
acceptance_criteria: Opening a PR auto-links to matching Linear issue and updates status.

title: Create control-plane runbook and incident checklist
description: Maintain a single source of truth for bootstrap, recovery, and checks.
acceptance_criteria: Runbook exists, is versioned, and can be followed from a clean machine.

title: Publish architecture snapshot for Chromebook controller model
description: Document ChromeOS/Crostini constraints and remote-core responsibilities.
acceptance_criteria: Architecture section includes boundaries, risks, and escalation paths.

title: Set weekly reliability review loop
description: Review healthcheck output, dependency drift, and open risks every week.
acceptance_criteria: A recurring checklist exists with dated review entries.
